calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-017 minimal orthogonal control-axis subset: FULL_AXES vs COLLAPSED_SCALAR vs MINIMAL_SUBSET (seeds [42,123])
items.note: EXP-0108 (EVB-0081): Q-017 asks what is the minimal orthogonal control-axis subset that preserves observed regime separations. Three conditions: FULL_AXES (3D: z_tonic=EMA(harm,tau=50), z_phasic=|harm-z_tonic|, z_affect=harm-benefit), COLLAPSED_SCALAR (1D: raw harm signal), MINIMAL_SUBSET (2D: z_tonic+z_phasic, no affect). Regime separation = mean |harm_rate_avoidance - harm_rate_exploration| + mean |action_entropy_exploitation - action_entropy_exploration|. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 FULL_AXES regime_sep > COLLAPSED_SCALAR regime_sep + THRESH_SEP_MARGIN (both seeds; orthogonal decomposition adds value); C2 FULL_AXES regime_sep > THRESH_SEP_ABS_MIN (both seeds; above-floor signal); C3 n_avoidance/exploitation/exploration_windows >= THRESH_MIN_REGIME_WINDOWS per condition per seed (data quality); C4 FULL_AXES axis_variance[tonic/phasic/affect] > THRESH_AXIS_VAR_MIN (both seeds; non-degenerate axes); C5 MINIMAL_SUBSET regime_sep direction seed-consistent. PASS (C1-C5 + |FULL-MINIMAL|>THRESH): all three axes load-bearing. PARTIAL_TWO_SUFFICIENT: C1-C4 but |FULL-MINIMAL|<=THRESH_EQUIV (both seeds); affective axis dispensable. PARTIAL_COLLAPSE_ADEQUATE: C1 fails; raw harm sufficient. FAIL: C2 or C3 fails. 3 conditions x 2 seeds = 6 cells. CausalGridWorldV2 size=8 num_hazards=4 num_resources=3 hazard_harm=0.1 env_drift_interval=10 env_drift_prob=0.3. 400 total episodes, 100 measurement (last quartile), 200 steps/ep. Mac-only (264 min estimate).

items.title: SD-003/ARC-033 obs-space forward model for E2_harm_s (TRAINED vs ABLATED)
items.note: Fixes EXQ-115 identity collapse. Three root causes of EXQ-115 harm_fwd_r2=0: (1) co-training instability -- HarmEncoder and HarmForwardModel updated concurrently against each other's changing outputs; (2) representational sparsity -- encoder supervised on one scalar label, 31/32 z_harm dims unstructured; (3) identity collapse -- per-step proximity change tiny, MSE-optimal solution is z_harm_next=z_harm_curr, giving zero counterfactual signal. Fix (Approach B): train forward model in OBSERVATION SPACE (harm_obs_s_next [51] prediction) using residual architecture (predict delta, not absolute). Staged training: P0=HarmEncoder pre-train 50 eps (frozen fwd), P1=frozen encoder + obs-fwd model 80 eps, P2=E3 calibration 30 eps, P3=attribution eval 40 eps. Causal pipeline: obs_cf=fwd(harm_obs_t, a_cf) -> z_harm_cf=frozen_enc(obs_cf) -> causal_sig=harm_eval(z_harm_t1)-harm_eval(z_harm_cf). Dry-run: obs_fwd_r2=0.56 in just 3 training eps (vs EXQ-115 R2=0.0 after full training). 6 cells = 2 seeds (TRAINED+ABLATED evaluated per seed). 200 eps x 200 steps x 2 seeds. ~50 min DLAPTOP-4.local.

items.title: MECH-071 contact-gated z_goal seeding (seeding quality fix)
items.note: Fixes EXQ-085f seeding quality failure (benefit_ratio=0.28x, goal_resource_r=0.087). Root cause: proximity-EMA seeding fires on broad noisy field, anchoring z_goal to random z_world states with near-zero correlation to resource locations. Fix: contact-gated seeding -- z_goal updated with benefit=1.0 only on ttype==resource events (actual resource acquisition), anchoring to z_world observed at moment of contact. alpha_goal raised 0.1->0.3 (faster convergence per contact event, which are rarer than proximity events). Proximity seeding retained as secondary fallback. Key diagnostic: goal_resource_r (Pearson r between goal_proximity and resource_proximity) -- must exceed 0.2 for C2 to be achievable. 3 seeds x 2 conditions x 600 eps x 200 steps. ~90 min DLAPTOP-4.local.
